programme.title: Room 514
programme.desc: When Anna, a young, idealistic Israeli military investigator, confronts an elite officer with accusations of unnecessary violence against a Palestinian man in the Occupied Territories, her integrity and determination are challenged.

programme.title: A Thousand Times Good Night
programme.desc: Rebecca is one of the world's top war photographers. She must weather a major emotional storm when her husband and young daughters refuse to put up with her dangerous life any longer. They need Rebecca, who, however, loves both her family and her work.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

programme.title: Martinez
programme.desc: Martinez, an embittered Chilean in his sixties who has lived in Mexico for the past 40 years, is being forced to retire from his job. As he struggles with life changes, things change as a neighbour suddenly dies.

programme.title: Baltic Files I - The Body On The Beach
programme.desc: After being transferred to the German-Danish border, Chief Inspector Svenja is tasked with a case involving a body on a beach. With her new colleague Antione, she investigates a case which involves a liquor dealer and a tragedy that goes back decades.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: All The Songs We Never Sang
programme.desc: Rebellious teen Natsumi ventures from Tokyo to a small island to meet her aunt and learn the art of pearl diving (but secretly to find a treasure she was told about as a child).

programme.title: Cortina Express
programme.desc: During the Christmas holidays in Cortina, a colorful cast of characters cross paths among the snow-capped Ampezzo mountains. Between love, redemption, and second-chances, their lives collide in a series of hilarious and heartfelt quests for a happy ending

programme.title: Hard Luck
programme.desc: A family comes to the funeral of their beloved grandfather. After the burial it turns out that the numbers grandfather always bet at the lottery just won big, but the winning ticket was buried with him. The race for the buried ticket begins.

Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Philips Azur Steam Iron
programme.desc: The Philips Azur 8000 Series Steam Iron delivers powerful performance with OptimalTEMP technology, ensuring that no fabric will be burned. The intelligent temperature control guarantees no scorching, allowing you to iron both horizontally and vertically with ease. Philips Azur 8000系列蒸汽熨斗有OptimalTEMP免调校温控技术，保证不会把面料烫坏。智能温控保证不熨焦，让您水平、垂直熨烫一机搞定！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Dontz Mini Massage Gun
programme.desc: Say goodbye to muscle tension, fatigue, and soreness – this mini powerhouse delivers a therapeutic experience with targeted relief. 迷你筋膜枪小巧精悍，捶打式冲击力十足直达肌肉深层！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos Shuttle Chef Thermal Cooker
programme.desc: Energy-saving, no-fire thermal cooker preserves nutrients, prepare in the morning, enjoy a hot meal later 节能无火焖烧锅，保持食物营养, 早上轻松准备，晚上即可享用热食

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - SINGCHOICE Bone Health Formula & Eyes Nourisher
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Vileda EasyWring Spin Mop & Bucket Cleaning Bundle Set
programme.desc: The secret weapon for effortless cleaning. 说再见脏地板，迎接闪亮干净！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kyocera Ceramic Knife
programme.desc: Ultra-sharp, lightweight, and rust-proof—preserve food’s natural color and nutrients. Effortlessly cut fruits, vegetables, and boneless meat. Reinforced black blades stay sharp 10× longer than steel. Smooth surfaces make cleaning quick and easy, delivering precise, effortless cutting every time 体验日本匠心工艺——锋利轻巧、不生锈，保留食材原色和营养。轻松切水果、蔬菜和无骨肉类。强化黑刃版比钢刀锋利10倍更持久，光滑表面易清洗，精准切割，高效省力。

programme.title: Melur Untuk Firdaus 2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Melur decides to focus on writing her novel and leaves the company's administration to Zachery. Zain becomes desperate to get Lily back to him.

programme.title: Belah Hati - EP 13
programme.desc: Said dies after getting stabbed by Rizman. After his death, Ida becomes enraged. She refuses to talk to or have anything to do with anyone including the boys. She disappears. Shafiq and Farhan regret not treating Said well while he is alive. They feel guilty. The 2 boys finally decide to make peace with each other. Nur persuades Ida to accept the 2 boys but Ida is hard hearted. She has lost everything and refuses to play nice.

programme.title: Kemelut - EP 6
programme.desc: Kemelut (Life Crisis) Kemelut is a drama series that focuses on the different life crises of an affluent Malay family of four. To the public, Rusdis family is seen as the ideal family With everyone living their own lives, they are trying to keep each other out from their affairs, brewing lies ....

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 10
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 25
